name: Ferrari N.V.
description: Ferrari N.V. is a world-renowned Italian luxury sports car manufacturer based in Maranello, Italy, with its holding company domiciled in the Netherlands. Founded by Enzo Ferrari in 1939, the company is synonymous with high-performance engineering, iconic design, and a prestigious racing heritage, particularly through its Scuderia Ferrari Formula One team. Ferrari designs, engineers, and produces a range of exclusive luxury sports cars that are sold in over 60 markets worldwide. The brand remains a global symbol of automotive excellence, combining cutting-edge technology with traditional Italian craftsmanship and a commitment to innovation.
